message:
🌱 Add keda: Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in mission (#1319)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-1963-support-pod-conditions-for-calculating-pendingjobcount-in-accurate-sca",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in accurate scaling startegy",
+    "description": "Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in accurate scaling startegy. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current keda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your keda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nhelm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working keda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\n### Proposal\n\nCurrently KEDA looks for the Pod phase (when scaling strategy is set to `accurate`) to determine whether a pod is pending or not in order to avoid excess triggers when pod is waiting to start or create."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in…",
+        "description": "Added the `pendingPodConditions` setting for which users can pass a list of [Pod Conditions](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/_print/#pod-conditions) which Keda will consider when calculating the pending job count.\n```yaml\nscalingStategy:\n  strategy: \"accurate\"\n  customPendingPodConditions: \n    - \"Ready\"\n    - \"PodScheduled\"\n    - \"SomeOtherCustomConditionDefinedByReadinessGate\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added the `pendingPodConditions` setting for which users can pass a list of [Pod Conditions](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/_print/#pod-conditions) which Keda will consider when calculating the pending job count.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "scalingStategy:\n  strategy: \"accurate\"\n  customPendingPodConditions: \n    - \"Ready\"\n    - \"PodScheduled\"\n    - \"SomeOtherCustomConditionDefinedByReadinessGate\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "keda",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "keda"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Job"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/kedacore/keda/pull/1970"
+    },

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
